examples: "What does your father do?"—"Well, he's a civil servant."
He was a loyal, distinguished and very competent civil servant.
His work as a civil servant was a cover for his activities as a spy.
When he isn't playing or cooling his heels in some civil servant's office, Sunny goes slumming.
Lord Alderdice, the former Speaker of the Assembly and retired Irish civil servant Joe Brosnan.
